title: Phyllagathis longispicatus

preparations: Phyllagathis longispicatus is a plant species that has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia. intro: Phyllagathis longispicatus, a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae, is native to Southeast Asia and is known for its medicinal properties.
